description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The front facade features a combination of large windows and solid wall panels, providing a balance of privacy and natural light. The house includes a driveway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small porch and a pathway. The rear and side yards are enclosed, offering green spaces and additional privacy. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and bedroom areas, separated by partial walls and doors. The exterior color palette consists of neutral tones, with gray, white, and natural wood finishes dominating the design.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a wooden fence, surrounded by landscaped greenery. The design features neutral colors and an open, functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, porch, and a mix of large windows and solid wall panels, with landscaping and trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, flat roof, and enclosed green space, with the wooden fence and trees visible along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the open-plan interior, large windows, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces, with the fence and trees framing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back entrance, additional windows, and the continuation of the fenced yard and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch, and pathway, framed by landscaping and minimal decorative elements.
